summary: Excellent soundboard recording with standout Scarlet Fire and Sugaree, though the show elicits mixed feelings among fans.
review: The SBD capture is praised as the best‑sounding source of this concert, even including a quirky Jamaican intro that leads into Garcia’s “Sugaree.” While several reviewers name‑check “Scarlet Fire” and call the performance one of their favorites, another reviewer recalls the night being a disappointment, resulting in an overall mixed sentiment.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the recording highly and note superb sound quality; show comments are largely positive with one clear negative, yielding a solid but not flawless overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as the best‑sounding of multiple sources, crisp enough to include the pre‑show Jamaican intro; no dropout or muffling reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Unique Jamaican spoken intro leads directly into “Sugaree,” giving the show a memorable start; overall regarded as a favorite by tape traders despite one reviewer calling the night a bummer.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia launches into “Sugaree” right after the funny Jamaican intro.
